package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormChainBuiltInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_chain_built_in_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that construct `Where`, `Joins`, `Scopes`, or `Order` chains directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
